landing.hero_description: UNMAPPED helps young people in Lima and Accra turn informal experience into documented economic identity — using open World Bank data and the global ISCO/ESCO skills taxonomy.
landing.personas_label: Diego, 21, Cusco — motorcycle mechanic, Facebook seller
landing.personas_label_2: Amara, 22, Accra — phone repair, self-taught Python
landing.modules_subtitle: Not an app. Infrastructure any government or employer can fork.
landing.module_1_desc: Translate informal experience into ISCO/ESCO standardized skills using Claude.
landing.module_2_desc: Frey-Osborne automation risk calibrated for your local economy — not the U.S. baseline.
landing.module_3_desc: Real openings matched on wage, sector trend, and ILOSTAT employment signals.
landing.infra_desc: Switch the entire app — language, currency, calibration, data sources, demo persona — between Peru and Ghana with a single click. No redeploy. No code change.
landing.footer: Real public data only · ESCO v1.2.0 · Frey-Osborne 2013 · ILOSTAT · World Bank WDI 2024 · MIT License

onboarding.title: Tell us about yourself
onboarding.subtitle: Write freely — the more you share, the better your profile. Use your own words, in any language.
onboarding.description_label: Describe your work, skills, and experience
onboarding.description_helper: characters · write or speak in any language
onboarding.voice_hint: Write or speak in any language — Quechua, Español, English…
onboarding.voice_unsupported: Voice input not supported in this browser.

profile.skills_count: skills identified · mapped to ESCO v1.2.0
profile.confidence_tooltip: How confident we are this skill maps to ESCO. 100% = explicit mention; lower scores indicate inferred or partial matches.
profile.no_skills: No skills extracted. Try providing more detail.

risk.title: AI Readiness Lens
risk.subtitle: Calibrated for the local economy · Frey-Osborne 2013 + ILO task indices

match.title: Opportunities for you
match.subtitle: Real ILOSTAT wages · Real World Bank growth rates · Scored by skill match × wage × growth
match.no_results: No opportunities found for this filter.
match.footer: Wages: ILOSTAT 2023 · Employment growth: ILOSTAT 2022–2024 · Macro indicators: World Bank WDI 2024

dashboard.risk_dist_sub: % of profiled youth by risk band
dashboard.kpi_gdp_explain: Gross Domestic Product per person — average yearly economic output per resident. Higher means richer on average, but says nothing about distribution.
dashboard.kpi_neet_explain: Share of youth (15–24) Not in Education, Employment, or Training. A core World Bank indicator of disconnected youth.
dashboard.kpi_informal_explain: Share of total employment in the informal sector — workers without formal contracts, social security, or labor protections.
dashboard.kpi_internet_explain: Share of the population with internet access. Determines whether digital opportunities are reachable for the workforce.

admin.label: Country configuration
admin.title: One config file. Any country.
admin.subtitle: Switch the active country. The entire app — language, currency, data sources, demo persona, automation calibration — reconfigures instantly. No redeploy. No code change.
admin.footer: This switch propagates to all pages. Any government can fork this repo and add a config file for their own country.
